yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> David Mitchell called and asked if I would get your
> permission to make a  
> disclosure of information requested by the Dade
> County Board of Value Adjustment  
> in connection with the Hotel project.  Specifically
> the Value Adjustment  
> Board application requests the name and address of
> the beneficial owners of the  
> entities that are investors in the project, in this
> case the beneficial owner 
> of  FTC.  
>  
> May David Mitchell disclose to the Dade County Value
> Adjustment Board your  
> name (and USVI address) as the sole beneficial owner
> of FTC?  FYI, David  told 
> me today that he has already disclosed in a
> landmarks approval application  
> FTC's name as an investor in the Hotel project.
>  
> Please advise.
>  
> Darren

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

David Mitchell called and asked if I would get your
permission to make a
disclosure of information requested by the Dade
County Board of Value Adjustment
in connection with the Hotel project. Specifically
the Value Adjustment
Board application requests the name and address of
the beneficial owners of the
entities that are investors in the project, in this
case the beneficial owner
of FTC.

May David Mitchell disclose to the Dade County Value
Adjustment Board your
name (and USVI address) as the sole beneficial owner
of FTC? FYI, David told
me today that he has already disclosed in a
landmarks approval application
FTC's name as an investor in the Hotel project.

Please advise.

Darren
